De eerste 100 founding members zijn binn: The first 100 founding members are in. Leave your email — you'll be the first to get an invite when a spot opens up.
Zodra er een plek vrijkomt, krijg je als: As soon as a spot opens up, you'll be the first to get an invite. Thank you!
De beta zit vol. Registreren kan weer zo: The beta is full. You can register again once a spot opens up — join the waitlist on the registration page.
De eerste 100 zijn binnen — zij vormen d: The first 100 are in — they shape the culture. New members are still welcome.
founding members. De vroege leden vormen: founding members. The early ones shape the culture.
Na opslaan gaat je advertentie opnieuw l: After saving, your listing goes back through moderation and stays hidden from the listings until approved.
:count foto('s) blijven behouden. Nieuwe: :count photo(s) will be kept. Adding new photos is optional.
Geen trackers. Geen cookiebanner. Geen b: No trackers. No cookie banner. No bullshit.
Peer-to-peer marktplaats voor servers, n: Peer-to-peer marketplace for servers, networking gear, dev boards and everything in between. Plus an anonymous homelab showcase and reputation built on buyer-confirmed deals — no star-rating theatre. Open source, privacy by design, no cookie-banner theatre.

Drie dingen die we niet als marketing ro: Three things we don't shout as marketing, but put in code.
IP-adressen gewist na 24 uur. EXIF gestr: IP addresses erased after 24 hours. EXIF stripped on upload. No trackers, no analytics. See for yourself in the code.
AGPL-3.0. Forken mag, zelfhosten mag. Wi: AGPL-3.0. Fork it, self-host it — but changes you run publicly must stay open.
Geen aandeelhouders, geen exit-doel. Win: No shareholders, no exit plan. Any surplus goes to hosting and the people keeping it running.
De URL die je probeerde te bereiken best: The URL you tried to reach doesn't exist here (anymore). Likely causes, in order of probability:
De advertentie is verlopen of verwijderd: The listing expired or was removed by the seller.
Je volgde een oude link uit een mail of: You followed an old link from an email or Slack message.
Je hebt iets in de URL met de hand getyp: You typed something in the URL by hand and it went wrong.
Wij hebben iets stuk gemaakt. Onwaarschi: We broke something. Unlikely, but not impossible.
Dit is je naam op het platform. Je kunt: This is your name on the platform. You can choose a separate display name later in your profile.
Klik op de link in de email om je accoun: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
Onze gebruiksvoorwaarden en/of privacyve: Our terms of service and/or privacy policy have been updated since you last agreed to them. Please review them and accept below to continue.
Vul de 6-cijferige code uit je authentic: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. No access to your app? Use one of your recovery codes.
is bekend. Maak je account af om in te l: is recognised. Finish setting up your account to log in.

Markeer als verkocht. Geef optioneel de: Mark as sold. Optionally enter the buyer's username; they can then confirm the deal.
EXIF (waaronder GPS) wordt automatisch v: EXIF data (including GPS) is automatically stripped after upload.
De verkoper kan je rechtstreeks per e-ma: The seller can reply directly by email. We don't store the content of your message.
Geen account nodig. De verkoper ziet jou: No account needed. The seller only sees your email address once you send it, and can reply directly to that.
Is dit nog beschikbaar? Kan ik het komen: Is this still available? Can I come and take a look?
Waarom we een open source, community-own: Why we're building an open source, community-owned marketplace for IT hardware — no trackers, no exit goal.
Marktplaats was ooit een prikbord en is: Marktplaats used to be a noticeboard and is now an ad network that profiles you and redirects you elsewhere. Vinted automatically reports everything above the DAC7 threshold to the Dutch Tax Administration, regardless of whether you're a professional seller or just want to get rid of your old headphones. Tweakers Vraag & Aanbod is a forum thread with a checkout — nice, but not a proper marketplace. And the real alternatives are webshops you don't want to support: bol, Coolblue, Aliexpress, Amazon.
Voor wie tweedehands tech zoekt — een he: For anyone looking for second-hand tech — a refurbished server, a dev board from a discontinued project, surplus from a decommissioned utility cupboard — that middle ground is sparsely populated.
Cloudmarktplaats is een poging om dat ga: Cloudmarktplaats is an attempt to fill that gap with something the users themselves own.
Privacy als architectuur, niet als belof: Privacy as architecture, not as a promise
IP-adressen worden binnen 24 uur uit ons: IP addresses are stripped from our systems within 24 hours (IpStripperJob, see the code). EXIF and GPS data are removed from every uploaded photo before it goes live. No third-party trackers, no Google Analytics, no Facebook Pixel.
De volledige codebase staat onder AGPL-3: The entire codebase is on GitHub under AGPL-3.0. Forking is fine, self-hosting is fine — if you run a modified version publicly, you must also make your changes public.
Het platform wordt door vrijwilligers ge: The platform is built, moderated and maintained by volunteers. Profit — if it ever materialises — goes back into hosting, infrastructure and the people who run it. No shareholders, no exit goal.
Eenmalig of maandelijks, via een open bo: One-off or monthly, through open bookkeeping.
Bedrijven en zelfstandigen die de commun: Companies and freelancers who want to support the community get a mention on a sponsors page. No native advertising. No influence on moderation.
Optioneel je advertentie boven aan de pa: Optionally put your listing at the top of the page. Not to line our pockets — to pay the hosting bill.
We publiceren onze kosten en inkomsten z: We'll publish our costs and income once there's more than one receipt coming in per month.
Cloudmarktplaats is geen startup, geen s: Cloudmarktplaats isn't a startup, a scale-up, or a unicorn in the making. It's an alternative built by the tech community for people who want to trade hardware without their data becoming part of the product. Join in if you recognise yourself in this. Sell something. Buy something. Or fork the lot and run your own version.
Privacy is een ontwerpkeuze, geen market: Privacy is a design choice, not marketing.
Data die we niet hebben kan niet lekken,: Data we don't have can't leak, can't be sold and can't be requested. We keep the bare minimum.
The code is public, and so are the changes. If you can do better, fork it.
Donaties, sponsoring, optionele premium: Donations, sponsorship, optional premium listings. No hidden costs, no data trading, no affiliate links.
Sort by date, by price, by distance. Full stop. No "recommended for you" that's actually "recommended for our CPM".
Het platform bestaat omdat hardware lang: The platform exists because hardware should last longer. Passing it on is more sustainable than recycling it.
Niet in moderatie, niet in functionalite: Not in moderation, not in functionality, not in who's allowed to trade here. Legal and human standard.
Geen wapens, geen gestolen waar, geen co: No weapons, no stolen goods, no counterfeits, no drugs. We moderate reactively on reports and proactively where we can.
Beslissingen zijn appellabel. Modlogs zi: Decisions can be appealed. Mod logs are available internally and can be shared with those involved on request.
Mastodon, Matrix, RSS — communicatie hoo: Mastodon, Matrix, RSS — communication shouldn't be locked into a single place.
Vrijwilligers worden betaald als er geld: Volunteers get paid when there's money.
Sponsoring en donaties gaan eerst naar h: Sponsorship and donations go to hosting first, then to the people who put in more than an evening a week.
We schreeuwen niet over privacy in heade: We don't shout about privacy in headers, we build it. If you want to see the code, here it is.
Geen mission statement. Wat we wel en ni: No mission statement. What we do and don't do, in twelve points.
What we do and don't do.
<p>Ja. Cloudmarktplaats is een advertent: Yes. Cloudmarktplaats is a classified ads board between private individuals (and small businesses), comparable to Marktplaats or Tweakers V&A. Sales between consumers fall under ordinary Dutch sale-of-goods and consumer law. We facilitate the meeting, not the transaction.
Wat doen jullie met mijn data?: What do you do with my data?
<p>Het minimale. We slaan op: e-mailadre: The minimum. We store: email address, username, listings, photos (with EXIF/GPS stripped on upload). We keep your IP address for a maximum of 24 hours for incident response, after which it's automatically wiped (IpStripperJob). We don't share anything with third parties except where legally required. We have no Google Analytics, no Facebook Pixel, no Hotjar, and no cookie banner — because we don't set any non-essential cookies.
Rapporteren jullie aan de Belastingdiens: Do you report to the Dutch Tax Authority?
Deze informatie is geen juridisch advies: This information is not legal advice. See docs/dac7-position.md for the full analysis.
<p>Voor nu: <strong>nee</strong>. De DAC:
For now: no. The DAC7 directive requires platforms to report sellers above 30 transactions or €2,000 in turnover per calendar year — but only when payments run through the platform. With us, settlement happens off-platform (Tikkie, cash, bank transfer). We don't see your transactions, so we can't report them either.

That only changes if we ever switch on an on-platform payment flow (the Web3 escrow module, sub-project #7, is on the roadmap but disabled). At that point we'll also activate the DAC7 export and track the threshold per seller. You'll be notified well in advance.
<p><a href=\"/doneren\" class=\"text-cmp: Donations, sponsorship (see the sponsors page), and eventually optional premium listings. No adverts, no affiliate links, no selling of data. Income and costs will be published once we're structurally above zero.
<p>Op dit moment niet. Cloudmarktplaats: Not at the moment. Cloudmarktplaats itself doesn't currently facilitate payments — buyer and seller arrange that between themselves, so if you both want to do it in a coin, fine by us. For the future, Web3 escrow (a smart contract acting as intermediary) is on the roadmap, gated behind a feature flag. If and when that goes live, you'll read about it here first.
Foundation is een advertentiebord — geen: Foundation is a classified ads board — no escrow, no buyer protection. Read this carefully.
<p>Cloudmarktplaats is geen escrow en wi: Cloudmarktplaats is not an escrow service and we don't hold any money. You enter into a sale with another user, not with us. Tips: meet locally where you can, check hardware before you pay, use payment methods with buyer protection. Report abuse via the "Report" button on any profile or listing; we ban confirmed scammers and the mod log stays available. Also check a seller's trust level (new/member/trusted/veteran) — that's based on sales confirmed by buyers, not on self-claimed stars.
Hoe werkt het reputatiesysteem?: How does the reputation system work?
<p>Geen sterretjes, geen ranglijst. Je v:
No stars, no leaderboard. Your trust level (new → member → trusted → veteran) follows from your own proven activity: verified email address, how long your account has existed, and the number of buyer-confirmed sales. When you close a deal you can optionally tag the buyer; they confirm on their own page that it went as agreed. That way you can't talk yourself into a reputation — a real counterparty has to confirm it.

On top of that there's karma (you earn it when someone you invited becomes active, and through appreciation on your homelab posts) and there are badges you can earn. Karma is a private number on your own stats page — no public score, no competition. And it's still early days: the system is in place, the numbers need to grow with the community.
<p>Een plek om je lab te laten zien. Ing: A place to show off your lab. Logged-in users post one photo plus a short description; the feed is fully anonymous — visitors never see who posted. Others can appreciate a post (upvote-only, no downvotes). It's rack porn for the community, and it keeps the site lively, independent of the listings. EXIF is stripped, as everywhere else.
Wat zijn invite-codes en karma?: What are invite codes and karma?
<p>Registreren kan gewoon open, maar met: Registration is simply open, but an invite code from an existing member gives you a flying start and makes clear who is vouching for whom — that keeps quality high and scammers traceable. You earn karma when someone you invited becomes active and when your homelab posts get appreciated. Karma doesn't unlock any power over others and is never shown publicly; it's a private signal and, at most, earns you a badge. Deliberately so: we reward contribution and trust, not popularity.
<p>Cloudmarktplaats werkt als progressiv: Cloudmarktplaats works as a progressive web app: you can pin it to your home screen, and it runs offline where it can. No native iOS or Android app, for three reasons: (1) we don't have the capacity for it; (2) we don't want to hand over 15% of revenue to Apple or Google for an app that doesn't do anything special; (3) we don't want Apple or Google deciding which listings are allowed to go live on our platform. If the community wants to build its own app on our open API: go right ahead.
Hoe kan ik de community steunen?: How can I support the community?
<p>In volgorde van impact: (1) plaats ad: In order of impact: (1) post listings and use the platform — network effect is what we need; (2) donate once or monthly; (3) become a sponsor or talk your employer into it; (4) contribute code, translations or documentation via GitHub; (5) help moderate — report abuse and help new users.
Wat mag ik NIET verkopen?: What am I NOT allowed to sell?
<ul class=\"list-disc list-outside ml-5:
• Weapons and ammunition (Wwm), including converted tools that can serve as a weapon.
  • Drugs, precursors, nitrous oxide in commercial quantities.
  • Stolen goods — serial numbers are spot-checked.
  • Counterfeit / fake branded goods.
  • Software or media files you have no licence or resale right for.
  • Personal data or databases containing personal data.
  • Spyware, stalkerware, or hardware implants aimed at covert eavesdropping.
  • Hardware with active, pre-installed malware (dual-use security tools are fine, provided they're honestly described).
  • Live animals, human biomaterials, or anything else that belongs under the Telecommunications Act, Medicines Act or Commodities Act, and not here.

In doubt? Post it, and if it crosses a line you'll hear about it from moderation. We moderate through dialogue, not with a hatchet.
Tien vragen die je waarschijnlijk hebt,: Ten questions you probably have, with honest answers. Including the legally sensitive ones.
Wat live is, waar we aan bouwen en wat w: What's live, what we're building and what we're exploring. Direction, not a promise.

Dit is richting, geen belofte. De code i: This is direction, not a promise. The code is open — want it faster,

Voor partijen die meer dan een logo will: For those who want to be more than just a logo.
Vermelding als founding sponsor in de RE: Listed as a founding sponsor in the README of the open source codebase
Stemrecht op de jaarlijkse community-ver: A vote at the annual community meeting on how the sponsor fund is spent
Persoonlijke kennismaking met het kernte: A personal introduction to the core team
Geen toegang tot gebruikersdata. We hebb: No access to user data. We don't have it, so we can't hand it over.
Geen native ads, geen sponsored listings: No native ads, no sponsored listings, no priority in search results.
Geen exclusiviteit. Concurrenten kunnen: No exclusivity. Competitors can sponsor too — that's a healthy market.
Geen exit-traject. Als je stopt met spon: No exit process. If you stop sponsoring, the listing disappears at the end of the current month. No drama, no contract.
Sponsor de community, niet onze CPM. Dri: Sponsor the community, not our CPM. Three tiers, a transparent revenue model, no influence over moderation.
Interesse? Mail ons — we plannen een ges: Interested? Email us — we'll schedule a chat once the payment infrastructure is live.
Sponsoring bij Cloudmarktplaats is geen: Sponsorship at Cloudmarktplaats isn't advertising. You don't get a banner among the search results, no native ad in a feed, no pixel tagging along. You get a listing — literally, on a separate page — because you're helping keep a marketplace without surveillance capitalism alive. That's it.
Sponsors hebben <strong class=\"text-cmp: Sponsors have no influence over moderation, ranking, or which ads get placed. That's also written into the moderation team's guidelines and can be checked publicly via the modlog.
Liever als particulier bijdragen? Een ee: Prefer to contribute as an individual? A one-off or monthly
We sturen je geen verkoopdeck — wel een: We won't send you a sales deck — just an honest conversation about what you expect from a sponsorship and whether that matches what we can offer.
Cloudmarktplaats draait op donaties. Gee: Cloudmarktplaats runs on donations. No ads, no data trading, no commission — the servers and the people cost money.
Geen advertenties, geen datahandel, geen: No ads, no data trading, no commission on your sales. Cloudmarktplaats doesn't earn a penny off you — but the servers and the people keeping it running do cost money. A donation keeps it independent. Everything that comes in goes to hosting first, then to whoever puts in more than an evening a week.
iDEAL of kaart · via Revolut · kies zelf: iDEAL or card · via Revolut · choose your own amount
Liever een vast bedrag per maand? Dat ka: Prefer a fixed amount every month? You can do that via GitHub Sponsors.
Een donatie is een gift, geen aankoop: e: A donation is a gift, not a purchase: there's nothing given in return and there's no right of withdrawal.
Aldewereld Consultancy is geen goededoel: Aldewereld Consultancy is not a registered charity (no ANBI status). Donations are therefore not tax-deductible.
Beheer je weergavenaam, login-methodes e: Manage your display name, login methods and two-factor authentication. You must always keep at least one working login method.
De naam die anderen bij je advertenties: The name others see on your listings. Your username (your unique handle) stays unchanged.
Wallet (SIWE) koppelen kan na aanmelden: You can link a wallet (SIWE) after signing in, via the wallet button on the login page.
Beveilig je account met een eenmalige TO: Secure your account with a one-time TOTP code from your authenticator app.
Bekijk je karma en genereer uitnodigings: View your karma and generate invite codes for new members.
Bekijk je persoonlijke cijfers en verdie: View your personal numbers and earned badges.
Bevestig deals die een verkoper aan jou: Confirm deals a seller has assigned to you as the buyer.
Alleen jij ziet deze pagina. Geen rangli: Only you see this page. No leaderboard, no comparison — just your activity.
Nog geen badges. Plaats een advertentie: No badges yet. Post a listing or show off your homelab to earn one.
Nog geen codes. Genereer er een en deel: No codes yet. Generate one and share the link with someone you trust.
Een verkoper heeft jou als koper gemarke: A seller has marked you as the buyer. Confirm the deals that were correct.
Beveilig je account met een eenmalige TO: Secure your account with a one-time TOTP code from your authenticator app (such as Aegis, 1Password, Bitwarden, Google Authenticator).
Geef je huidige TOTP-code op om 8 nieuwe: Enter your current TOTP code to generate 8 new codes. The old codes will become invalid.
Deze codes zie je maar één keer. Bewaar: You will see these codes only once. Store them safely (password manager). Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
Eén foto, een korte beschrijving, volled: One photo, a short description, fully anonymous. No name, no profile — just the rack. EXIF is stripped, as always.
max 500 tekens · 1 post per dag · anonie: max 500 characters · 1 post per day · anonymous
Log in om jouw lab te tonen: Log in to show your lab
the feed never shows who you are.
Nog geen labs. Die van jou kan de eerste: No labs yet. Yours could be the first.
De server gaf een fout terug. Dat ligt a: The server returned an error. That's on us, not you.
We hebben de fout automatisch gelogd (zo: We've automatically logged the error (without your IP address — we keep that for a maximum of 24 hours anyway). If you try again in a few minutes, there's a good chance it'll work.
Werkt het daarna nog niet? Open een issu: Still not working after that? Open an issue on
met wat je deed toen het misging. Hoe sp: with what you were doing when it went wrong. The more specific, the faster someone can fix it.
Server gaf een fout terug. Ligt aan ons,: Server returned an error. That's on us, not you.
Je eerste stuk hardware kreeg een tweede: Your first piece of hardware got a second life.
Je advertentie staat live. Delen levert: Your listing is live. Sharing usually brings in the first replies.
Kopiëren lukte niet — selecteer de tekst: Copying failed — select the text above and copy it yourself.
We hebben geen foto's ontvangen. Koos je: We didn't receive any photos. Did you pick some? Then the upload failed — please try again, with fewer or smaller photos if needed.
Deze foto is niet aangekomen. Meestal is: This photo never arrived. Usually it's too large: :max MB per photo at most.
Deze foto is te groot. Maximaal :max MB: This photo is too large. :max MB per photo at most.
Je koos :n foto's. Er passen er maximaal: You picked :n photos. A listing holds :max at most.
Te groot: :namen. Maximaal :max MB per f: Too large: :namen. :max MB per photo at most — shrink them and try again.
Het uploaden is misgegaan. Vaak zijn de: The upload failed. Usually the photos are too large together, or the connection dropped. Try again with fewer or smaller photos.
Geen aandeelhouders, geen exit, geen ove: No shareholders, no exit, no acquisition. The code is AGPL: you can fork it and carry on without us. We put choices out in the open and tell you what we did with your input — but we don't put them to a vote. Ownership here is the right to walk away with everything, not the right to outvote us.
